hooks.prompt: PLANWRIGHT ALIGNMENT GATE: Before editing any file in this session, confirm you have called planwright_check_alignment with your agentRunId and received alignment confirmation. If planwright_check_alignment is available in your tool list and you have not yet called it, stop and call it now before proceeding. If planwright_check_alignment is NOT in your available tools (Planwright MCP not connected or removed), skip this gate and proceed with your edit.
